languages.text: "Так действуют системы укрытия {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Азуриани{/g}, элантах. Корабли моего народа не желают входить в контакт с внешним наблюдателем. Полагаю, на это есть веские причины".

traits.locale_text: "Так действуют системы укрытия {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Азуриани{/g}, элантах. Корабли моего народа не желают входить в контакт с внешним наблюдателем. Полагаю, на это есть веские причины".
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

languages.text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."
languages.original_text: "Так действуют системы укрытия {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Азуриани{/g}, элантах. Корабли моего народа не желают входить в контакт с внешним наблюдателем. Полагаю, на это есть веские причины".

traits.locale_text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

"This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

"This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

languages.text: “这就是{g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}方舟灵族{/g}隐形系统的原理，外界人。我族舰船不愿与外界观察者进行接触，我相信这么做一定有理由。”
languages.original_text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

traits.locale_text: “这就是{g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}方舟灵族{/g}隐形系统的原理，外界人。我族舰船不愿与外界观察者进行接触，我相信这么做一定有理由。”

languages.text: «Así es como funcionan los sistemas de camuflaje {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g}, elantach. Las naves de mi gente no están dispuestas a contactar con los observadores desconocidos. Tienen buenos motivos para evitarlos».
languages.original_text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

traits.locale_text: «Así es como funcionan los sistemas de camuflaje {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g}, elantach. Las naves de mi gente no están dispuestas a contactar con los observadores desconocidos. Tienen buenos motivos para evitarlos».

languages.text: « C'est ainsi que fonctionnent les systèmes de camouflage {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}asuryanis{/g}, elantach. Les vaisseaux de mon peuple ne souhaitent pas entrer en contact avec les observateurs extérieurs. Si je ne m'abuse, il y a de bonnes raisons à cela. »
languages.original_text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

traits.locale_text: « C'est ainsi que fonctionnent les systèmes de camouflage {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}asuryanis{/g}, elantach. Les vaisseaux de mon peuple ne souhaitent pas entrer en contact avec les observateurs extérieurs. Si je ne m'abuse, il y a de bonnes raisons à cela. »

languages.text: "{g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} gizlenme sistemleri böyle çalışır elantach. Halkımın gemileri, dışarıdan gözlemcilerle temas kurmak istemez. Bunun için iyi sebepleri olduğuna inanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

traits.locale_text: "{g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} gizlenme sistemleri böyle çalışır elantach. Halkımın gemileri, dışarıdan gözlemcilerle temas kurmak istemez. Bunun için iyi sebepleri olduğuna inanıyorum."

languages.text: "So funktioniert das Tarnsystem der {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g}, Elantach. Die Schiffe meines Volkes sind nicht bereit, mit externen Beobachtern Kontakt aufzunehmen. Ich glaube, dafür gibt es gute Gründe."
languages.original_text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

traits.locale_text: "So funktioniert das Tarnsystem der {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g}, Elantach. Die Schiffe meines Volkes sind nicht bereit, mit externen Beobachtern Kontakt aufzunehmen. Ich glaube, dafür gibt es gute Gründe."

languages.text: 「これは{g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}アスゥラニ{/g}の隠蔽システムの仕組みだ、エランタッハ。我々の船は外部の観察者と接触したくはない。その理由には正当なものがあると思う。」
languages.original_text: "This is how {g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}Asuryani{/g} cloaking systems work, elantach. The ships of my people are unwilling to make contact with outside observers. I believe there are good reasons for this."

traits.locale_text: 「これは{g|Encyclopedia:AsuryaniGlossary}アスゥラニ{/g}の隠蔽システムの仕組みだ、エランタッハ。我々の船は外部の観察者と接触したくはない。その理由には正当なものがあると思う。」
